title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Embassy Group Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Embassy Group Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Embassy Group Digital Technologies are looking for an experienced Sales Manager based out of Ranchi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Embassy Group Digital Technologies:
Embassy Group Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Embassy Group Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
